content: Hi there! How can I help you today?
i have a complaint about my order
I'm sorry to hear that you have a complaint about your order. Please tell me more about what happened so I can help.
I'm so sorry to hear that your item arrived broken. That's definitely not what we want for our customers. How can I help resolve this for you?
i want full refund of that product's money
I can certainly help you with a full refund for that product. To process this, please provide me with your order number.

Thank you for providing your order number (123456).

For a full refund, you'll need to return the broken item. Once we receive it, we will process your refund within 5-7 business days to your original payment method. Would you like me to provide instructions for the return?
no thanks i will reach you again if any issue , for now i will return the item
Okay, sounds good! Please let us know if you have any questions during the return process or if you need anything else. We're here to help!
I'm sorry to hear you're experiencing a voice error. Could you please tell me more about what happened or what you were trying to do?
